injuries.comment: The Devils said on Wednesday's (Nov. 26) that Dadonov is expected to miss an extended period of time but is undergoing additional evaluation, Amanda Stein of the team's official site.
The Devils said that Dillon didn't play during the third period of Monday's (Dec. 1) matchup with the Blue Jackets for precautionary reasons, per Kristy Flannery of The Hockey News.
The Stars said on Wednesday (Nov. 19) that Harley is week-to-week and will not join the team for their four-game road trip, per Lia Assimakopoulos of The Dallas Morning News.
